items.name: UndoStack
items.doc: Undo/redo stack. All document mutations must go through apply().

items.name: new
items.doc: Create a new empty undo stack.

items.name: apply
items.signature: pub fn apply( &mut self, cmd: Box<dyn Command>, doc: &mut Document, ) -> Result<(), CommandError>
items.doc:
Apply a command to the document and push it to the undo stack.
Clears any redo history beyond the current cursor.

items.name: undo
items.signature: pub fn undo(&mut self, doc: &mut Document) -> Result<bool, CommandError>
items.doc: Undo the last command. Returns true if an undo was performed.

items.name: redo
items.signature: pub fn redo(&mut self, doc: &mut Document) -> Result<bool, CommandError>
items.doc: Redo the last undone command. Returns true if a redo was performed.

items.name: undo_description
items.doc: Description of the command that would be undone.

items.name: depth
items.doc: Number of commands in the history.
